name: Get Down
short_description: Get Down to the deepest point, to this Game's Creator, to RESET his gone wrong game world and save its NPCs. WHY YOU? Because only the file called Player can execute the reset button. BUT NOTE: If you fall, there's no saving.
detailed_description:
Get Down to the deepest point, to this Game's Creator, to RESET his gone wrong game world and save its NPCs.

WHY YOU? Because only the file called Player can execute the reset button.
BUT NOTE: If you fall, there's no saving.

GUIDE

1. Get down step by step.

2. Collect Health points and use them!

3. The average passing time of the game 50min - infinite. Be patient and if you fall, try again!

DISCLAIMER

This Game is NOT for you if you tend to:
  • hit your desk
  • punch your keyboard or monitor
  • have quarrelsome neighbors
  • have annoying children
  • high blood pressure
  • blame the devs... (intern joke, don't forget to delete this one...)
